mapper.select: SELECT tb_category.* FROM tb_category WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tb_category_relation WHERE tb_category_relation.descendant = tb_category.id AND public.tb_category_relation.depth = 1 )

SELECT tb_category.* FROM tb_category, tb_category_relation WHERE tb_category_relation.descendant = tb_category.id AND tb_category_relation.depth = 1 AND tb_category_relation.ancestor = #{baseCategoryId};
